div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 0
Environment Setup
Tools: IHP SG13G2 PDK, ngspice,
openEMS, CUDA
Output: GDS/, SPData/, EMLOG/ dirs

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 305px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 1
T-Coil Peaking Theory
Tools: (derivation only)
Output: peaking equations (L, C_B, k)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div:
Stage 2
Parametric Geometry
Generator
[ext-tool] gdspy

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 905px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;

div.div:
Stage 3
EM Simulation
(batched / distributed)
[ext-tool] openEMS, CSXCAD, Ray
[artifact] .s3p Touchstone files

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 905px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 4
ANN Surrogate Model
[ext-tool] PyTorch, scikit-rf
[artifact] deeper_mlp_model.pt +
normalization arrays

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 605px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;

div.div:
Stage 5
SPICE Netlist
Generation
[ext-tool] ngspice
[artifact] .cir netlists

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 305px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 6
CMA-ES Inverse Design
[ext-tool] Optuna (CmaEsSampler),
spicelib, multiprocessing
[artifact] optimized geometry +
verification plots

div.div:
Stage 7
Reference / Conclusion
Tools: (none)
Output: report narrative
